flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Bethel University fell 23% between 2021 and 2024 (53.5% → 41.4%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Bethel University fell 16% between 2021 and 2024 (63.2% → 53.2%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Bethel University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($30.8k → $34.6k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Bethel University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($30.8k → $34.6k).
